name: amd-project
description: A live single-page dashboard for the GPU-accelerated number theory engine.

scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$m = (netstat -ano | Select-String ':5000 '); if ($m) { $p = $m.ToString().Trim().Split(' ')[-1]; if ($p -match '^\d+$') { taskkill /PID $p /F 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }"
